_comment: CURATED HIDDEN MATCHUP KNOWLEDGE — the stuff you can't compute. A rule fires when ALL its 'ally' champs are on your side of a lane AND ALL its 'enemy' champs are on theirs. Rules can be single-champion (apply inside any lane containing that pairing) or full pairs. Curated lines beat the generic tag engine.

lines: You do NOT need to match Caitlyn's CS. A CS deficit is fine if she can't convert her range into plates or kills.
Your win condition is a health-advantage game: poke them down, deny their walk-up, and keep them off the tower.
Respect the level-2 spike — Caitlyn+Blitz have one of the strongest 2-item all-ins in bot. Don't be caught out of position at that moment.
Stand behind your minions so Blitz can't hook you — a hook on Karma ends the trade before it starts.
When his hook is on cooldown, that's YOUR window to walk up and poke; the rest of the time, don't give him the target.
Don't throw Bubbles randomly trying to poke — Leona WANTS you to waste your defensive tool.
Save Bubble for when she commits with E. Your job isn't to kill Leona; it's to make every engage of hers fail.
Leona has no poke. If she can't all-in, she does nothing — so deny the all-in and you win the lane by default.
You lose the pure lane-bully phase — that's expected. Farm safe under tower and let your item spike flip it.
